description: Figure 1通过工艺曲线、样品宏观形貌、SEM显微组织及EBSD相图，对比了不同soaking温度（1100–1200°C）对Fe-Mn-Al-Cr钢热轧板开裂行为的影响。结果显示，1150°C和1200°C soaking导致晶粒粗化（~60μm）及晶界处大量脆性DO₃相（红色）形成，引发晶间裂纹；而1100°C soaking获得细晶组织（~35μm）和较少的DO₃相（8.1%），成功实现热轧。
该图展示了Fe-Mn-Al-C轻质钢均质化热处理工艺(a)及不同冷却方式下的微观组织演变规律。SEM显微照片(b,c)显示空冷试样晶界处存在连续分布的脆性相，而水淬试样组织均匀；EBSD相图(d,e)进一步定量证实空冷导致晶界形成大量BCC结构的DO₃相（红色），而水淬抑制了奥氏体向DO₃相的转变，保持了FCC奥氏体基体（蓝色）的均匀性，从而解释了水淬样品具有优异强塑性的原因。

Comprehensive phase identification of the water-quenched ultralightweight steel combining XRD (a) and TEM (b) analysis. XRD pattern confirms the coexistence of austenite (γ), κ-carbide, and ordered DO₃ phase, while TEM micrographs reveal the nanoscale distribution of fine κ-carbide precipitates within the austenite matrix and the morphological characteristics of DO₃ phase at grain boundaries, demonstrating the uniform microstructure achieved through optimized heat treatment.
应力-应变曲线对比展示了空冷和水淬两种热处理条件对Fe-30Mn-13.2Al-1.6C-5Cr超轻钢拉伸性能的显著影响。空冷样品(a)因晶界处形成脆性有序DO3相而在668 MPa应力下仅0.3%应变即发生脆性断裂；相比之下，水淬样品(b)通过快速冷却抑制了DO3相的形成，获得了含细小κ碳化物的均匀奥氏体组织，表现出优异的延展性，抗拉强度达1048 MPa，总延伸率达37.8%。

SEM micrographs comparing the cross-sectional microstructures beneath the fractured surfaces of air-cooled (a) and water-quenched (b) specimens after tensile testing. The air-cooled specimen exhibits intergranular crack propagation along brittle DO₃ phase at grain boundaries with minimal plastic deformation of the austenite matrix, while the water-quenched specimen shows considerable elongation of the austenite matrix characteristic of ductile fracture, illustrating the microstructural origin of the superior tensile properties achieved through rapid cooling.
